# Auto-generated from pyproject.toml for Streamlit Cloud compatibility.
# Streamlit Cloud does not read pyproject.toml — it needs this file.
#
# RAG embeddings run on fastembed (ONNX runtime) instead of
# sentence-transformers+torch. The ONNX build keeps the runtime memory
# footprint at ~120-180MB vs ~500MB for torch, which is what makes the
# chatbot fit in the Render free tier (512MB) without OOMing. Same model
# (all-MiniLM-L6-v2), same embeddings, just a lighter engine.
fastapi>=0.136.1
fastembed>=0.3.0
folium>=0.20.0
geopy>=2.4.1
groq>=0.31.0
gunicorn>=26.0.0
loguru>=0.7.3
numpy>=2.0.0
pandas>=3.0.3
plotly>=6.7.0
psycopg2-binary>=2.9.12
requests>=2.34.2
sqlalchemy>=2.0.49
streamlit>=1.57.0
streamlit-folium>=0.27.2
uvicorn>=0.38.0
